title: Markdown Magic remote fetch cache
description: Epic for implementing the remote fetch cache described in docs/ai/plans/markdown-magic-remote-cache.md. Goal: reduce repeated Markdown Magic remote fetches while preserving the recent security boundary around private GitHub reads. The implementation must add process-local single-flight dedupe, a disk cache outside the repo, short TTL for movable branch/normal URLs, long TTL for immutable 40-character Git commit refs, private-content cache controls under allowPrivateGithub, cache hit logging that fits the current 'Getting remote' output, docs, tests, local davidwells.io validation, and release verification. Non-goals: no full HTTP RFC cache, no DB dependency, no failure caching in v1, no markdown-block opt-in for private auth/cache behavior.
close_reason: Completed all remote cache implementation, docs, local site validation, and release verification beads.

title: Build remote cache utility and tests
description: Create packages/core/src/utils/remote-cache.js and packages/core/src/utils/remote-cache.test.js. This utility is the core abstraction for disk cache and in-memory single-flight dedupe. It must normalize remoteCache config, detect an OS/user cache dir outside the repo, build SHA256 cache keys from method/canonicalUrl/source/privacyMode/cacheVersion, read/write UTF-8 body files plus sanitized metadata, ignore expired/corrupt entries, write atomically via temp files and rename, use best-effort 0700/0600 permissions, skip disk writes for private entries when remoteCache.cachePrivate is false, share concurrent duplicate fetches through one in-flight Promise, and expose helpers such as normalizeRemoteCacheOptions, buildRemoteCacheKey, withRemoteCache, getDefaultRemoteCacheDir, and clearMemoryRemoteCache. The utility must not contain transform-specific network logic. Tests must cover key stability, source separation, public/private separation, successful read/write, expiration, immutable TTL, corrupt metadata ignored, remoteCache false disabled behavior, private cache disabled behavior, and single-flight promise sharing.
close_reason: Implemented packages/core/src/utils/remote-cache.js with option normalization, OS cache directory detection, SHA256 request keys, disk metadata/body caching, expiration handling, private cache controls, atomic writes, best-effort permissions, and single-flight dedupe. Added remote-cache.test.js with 9 focused unit tests covering key stability, source/privacy separation, read/write, expiration, immutable TTL, corrupt metadata, disabled cache, private cache disabled, and concurrent single-flight.

title: Integrate cache with generic remoteRequest
description: Wrap packages/core/src/utils/remoteRequest.js with the remote cache utility for generic HTTP REMOTE fetches. Preserve URL normalization, demo URL skip behavior, failOnMissingRemote semantics, non-2xx error messages, and existing return values. Only successful text responses should be cached. Network request logging should happen only when the fetcher actually goes to the network; cache hits should not also log as network requests. Add/adjust tests so a local HTTP server is hit once on first run and not hit again while cache is fresh, and so disabling cache preserves current behavior.
close_reason: Integrated remote cache into packages/core/src/utils/remoteRequest.js for generic REMOTE HTTP fetches. Successful text responses are cached; invalid URL, DNS, and HTTP error behavior remains in the fetcher and errors are not cached. Added remoteRequest.test.js with local HTTP server coverage proving second call uses cache and remoteCache false preserves uncached behavior. Focused remote-cache/remoteRequest tests pass: 13 passed.

title: Integrate cache with GitHub raw API and gh fetchers
description: Wrap all GitHub fetch attempts in packages/core/src/utils/github-file.js with the remote cache utility. GitHub raw should use source github-raw and canonical raw.githubusercontent.com URL. GitHub contents API should use source github-api and canonical api.github.com contents URL. gh api fallback should use source gh-api and the same API URL with via label. Cache decoded final text at the fetcher boundary, not raw GitHub API JSON. Pass privacyMode public/private based on whether the request uses authenticated private-read behavior; gh-api is private because it uses local gh auth. Detect immutable refs only when ref or branch is a full 40-character Git commit SHA and apply remoteCache.immutableTtl; branches, refs/heads, tags, and short SHAs use normal TTL. Ensure line slicing still happens after cached content returns. Tests should avoid requiring real private GitHub auth by using helper-level injection or local deterministic paths where possible, and should prove source/privacy separation and immutable TTL selection.
close_reason: Integrated remote cache into GitHub raw/API/gh fetchers in packages/core/src/utils/github-file.js. Each concrete fetch path now has a source-specific cache identity: github-raw, github-api, gh-api. The cache stores decoded text, uses public/private privacy modes, treats gh-api as private, and applies immutable TTL only for full 40-character commit refs via isImmutableGitRef. REMOTE and CODE now pass cwd/remoteCache/silent/logRemoteRequests into the resolver. Added stubbed GitHub cache tests for raw/API caching and immutable ref detection; focused github-file/remote-cache tests pass: 22 passed.

title: Add cache hit logging and controls
description: Extend packages/core/src/utils/remote-log.js and remote-cache integration so cache hits are visible with the same user-facing language as remote fetches. Current desired shape is 'Getting remote:' for network and 'Getting remote (from cache):' for cache hits, with the URL on the next line and any via suffix such as '(gh api)' retained. Logs must remain deduped per process but distinguish request vs cache so a URL can appear once as a request and once as a cache hit. Respect silent, logRemoteRequests: false, and remoteCache.logHits: false. Keep URL sanitization shared and continue redacting obvious token-like query params. Tests must cover network log, cache log, dedupe, silent suppression, disabled log settings, and redaction.
close_reason: Completed cache-aware remote logging. remote-log.js now uses 'Getting remote:' and 'Getting remote (from cache):' with distinct request/cache dedupe keys, token-like query redaction, silent/logRemoteRequests controls, and via suffix support. remote-cache.js logs cache hits through the shared logger and respects remoteCache.logHits false. Focused remote-log/remote-cache tests pass: 13 passed.

title: Document remote cache configuration and security behavior
description: Update README.md, packages/core/src/index.js JSDoc, packages/core/src/transforms/index.js generated-doc source, docs/4-advanced-usage.md, and docs/troubleshooting.md to document the remote cache. Docs must explain defaults, remoteCache false / enabled false disabling, 5-minute normal TTL, long immutable commit-SHA TTL, cachePrivate false, custom cache directory, OS/user default cache location outside the repo, manual cache clearing, and logging behavior. Docs must clearly distinguish private GitHub fetch opt-in (allowPrivateGithub) from cache configuration, and must not recommend putting tokens in markdown. Include the security caveat that private fetched content can persist in cache when private reads and private caching are enabled.
close_reason: Documented remoteCache options, default TTLs and cache directory behavior, cache disabling forms, private GitHub caching security behavior, cache hit logging, and manual clearing guidance across README/API docs/advanced usage/troubleshooting.

title: Validate cache with davidwells.io local content sync
description: Validate the cache using the local davidwells.io content workflow with sources/content using the local Markdown Magic symlink. Run npm run gen -- --file projects/cogneato.md twice from /Users/david/Workspace/site/davidwells.io/sources/content. Acceptance: first run resolves the private Cogneato README through allowPrivateGithub, second immediate run shows 'Getting remote (from cache)' for the same request path, generated content remains stable, no private cache files are written inside the site repo by default, and log output is understandable. Also perform a quick full-content sanity run if feasible, or document why it was not run.
close_reason: Validated local davidwells.io sources/content against the local markdown-magic symlink. Targeted projects/cogneato.md run used a temp XDG cache outside the repo: first run performed raw/API remote requests, second run logged GitHub API fallback as Getting remote (from cache), and no file writes were needed. Confirmed no remote-cache-v1 directory under sources/content. Broader dry run showed cache-hit logs in a multi-file scan, then failed on unrelated stale banga/git-split-diffs master ref.

title: Run release verification and pack inspection
description: Run release-quality verification after implementation. Required checks: focused remote cache tests, full pnpm --filter markdown-magic test, pnpm --filter markdown-magic types, br dep cycles, pnpm pack --json --pack-destination /tmp from packages/core, and inspection that remote-cache.js / tests / generated declarations are included in the tarball. Document any transient network/flaky failures and rerun to confirm. Ensure .beads JSONL is flushed with br sync --flush-only and close all cache plan beads with evidence.
close_reason: Release verification passed: br dep cycles clean, focused remote cache/log/GitHub tests passed 27/27, pnpm --filter markdown-magic test passed 153/153 with 1 skipped, pnpm --filter markdown-magic types passed, and pnpm pack from packages/core included remote-cache source/tests and generated declarations.

title: Markdown Magic GitHub-aware REMOTE fallback
description:
Overarching goal: make Markdown Magic REMOTE blocks fetch GitHub-hosted files reliably, including private repository files that return anonymous 404s.

Background: davidwells.io fails while syncing sources/content/projects/cogneato.md because the REMOTE block points at https://github.com/DavidWells/saaslayer/blob/master/packages/cogneato/README.md. The current REMOTE path treats all URLs as plain HTTP via node-fetch. Markdown Magic already has GitHub-aware file resolution for CODE in packages/core/src/transforms/code/resolve-github-file.js, including raw GitHub, GitHub API, and gh api fallback.

Intended architecture: promote/harden the existing GitHub resolver into shared core infrastructure, use it from both CODE and REMOTE, preserve current behavior for non-GitHub URLs, keep gh optional, and document token/CLI behavior clearly.

Completion means: public GitHub blob/raw URLs work in REMOTE, private GitHub blob/raw URLs work with GITHUB_TOKEN/GITHUB_ACCESS_TOKEN or authenticated gh, existing CODE behavior remains compatible, tests cover parser/fallback behavior, docs explain usage, and the site cogneato sync path is validated.
close_reason: All child beads completed: shared resolver, REMOTE wiring, CODE migration, tests, docs, cogneato validation, and release-quality checks.

title: Run release-quality verification
description:
Run focused and package-level verification after implementation.

Scope: run pnpm --filter markdown-magic test, any focused resolver/REMOTE tests, and br dep cycles. If changes touch docs generation, note whether docs were regenerated manually or only source docs were edited.

Acceptance: automated tests pass or any failures are clearly documented as pre-existing/unrelated; no dependency cycles remain; all implementation beads can be closed with evidence.
close_reason: Verified pnpm --filter markdown-magic test, pnpm --filter markdown-magic types, and br dep cycles all pass.

title: Validate davidwells.io cogneato sync path
description:
Validate the real failing site case after the Markdown Magic resolver work.

Scope: inspect sources/content/projects/cogneato.md and decide whether the canonical source should be the public DavidWells/cogneato README or the private DavidWells/saaslayer/packages/cogneato README. If the source URL is simply wrong, correct it in site content; if private monorepo is canonical, validate that the new resolver can sync it using gh or token.

Acceptance: the cogneato REMOTE block no longer crashes with anonymous 404 in the intended local workflow; any site content change remains draft-safe and only touches the relevant file.
close_reason: Validated DavidWells/saaslayer packages/cogneato README through the new resolver using authenticated gh and dry-ran the site block into a temp output directory without modifying source.

title: Add resolver and transform tests
description:
Add focused test coverage for the GitHub resolver and REMOTE/CODE integration.

Resolver tests: GitHub blob URL with and without protocol, raw GitHub URL with and without protocol, #Lx-Ly ranges, refs/heads style URLs, unsafe path rejection, token resolution order, raw success short-circuit, API fallback with token, gh fallback without token, gh disabled behavior, and useful aggregate errors.

REMOTE tests: public GitHub blob URL sync, public raw URL sync, markdown formatting options such as removeLeadingH1/shiftHeaders still work, failOnMissingRemote=false preserves block content, failOnMissingRemote=true includes source markdown path.

CODE regression: existing CODE tests still pass after shared resolver migration.

Acceptance: tests are deterministic where possible; no real private token is required for the automated suite; manual private repo verification is documented separately.
close_reason: Added github-file unit coverage and REMOTE GitHub blob integration coverage; pnpm --filter markdown-magic test passes with 132 passed, 1 skipped.

title: Wire REMOTE through GitHub resolver
description:
Teach packages/core/src/transforms/remote.js to recognize GitHub file URLs and resolve them through the shared GitHub resolver before falling back to generic remoteRequest.

Scope: support options.url/options.src as today; pass through block-level accessToken/githubToken/useGhCli/preferGhCli/debugGithub and settings.github defaults; preserve formatMd processing for markdown extensions; preserve keepComments behavior.

Behavioral contract: non-GitHub URLs keep current node-fetch remoteRequest behavior; GitHub URLs should try raw/API/gh according to resolver policy; failOnMissingRemote=true should still throw a helpful error with original URL and source markdown path; failOnMissingRemote=false should keep existing block content.

Acceptance: REMOTE works with public GitHub blob URLs, raw URLs, and private URLs when token or gh auth is available.
close_reason: REMOTE now routes GitHub blob/raw URLs through the shared resolver before generic remoteRequest while preserving markdown formatting and failOnMissingRemote behavior.

title: Update CODE to consume shared resolver
description:
Move packages/core/src/transforms/code/index.js away from its transform-local GitHub resolver path and onto the shared resolver.

Scope: preserve local file behavior, URL-like local fallback behavior, remote raw behavior, GitHub blob/raw behavior, line range extraction, section/id handling, comment trimming, syntax detection, and error messages where practical.

Acceptance: existing CODE tests pass and imports no longer depend on packages/core/src/transforms/code/resolve-github-file.js as the source of truth unless that file is only a compatibility wrapper.
close_reason: CODE now imports the shared resolver through packages/core/src/utils/github-file.js; old transform-local resolver remains as a compatibility wrapper.

title: Harden shared GitHub file resolver
description:
Promote the existing CODE-only GitHub resolver into robust shared infrastructure.

Scope: create packages/core/src/utils/github-file.js from packages/core/src/transforms/code/resolve-github-file.js or otherwise make that resolver reusable without duplicating logic. Preserve compatibility exports needed by CODE.

Required behavior: parse GitHub blob URLs and raw.githubusercontent URLs, support line ranges, support refs/heads URLs where practical, use ?ref= for GitHub contents API, resolve accessToken/githubToken/process.env.GITHUB_ACCESS_TOKEN/process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN, and return useful method-specific failures.

Security requirements: replace child_process.exec with execFile('gh', ['api', endpoint]) so URL/path values are never shell-interpolated; never log tokens; validate owner/repo/path conservatively.

Acceptance: shared resolver exposes isGithubLink/isGithubRawLink/resolveGithubContents compatibility wrappers plus structured internal helpers; existing CODE imports can move to the shared resolver without behavior loss.
close_reason: Implemented shared GitHub resolver in packages/core/src/utils/github-file.js with token resolution, gh execFile fallback, API/raw helpers, compatibility wrapper, and parser coverage.

title: Document GitHub private REMOTE behavior
description:
Update user-facing documentation for GitHub-aware REMOTE behavior.

Scope: README and relevant docs should explain GitHub blob/raw URL support, private repo access via GITHUB_TOKEN/GITHUB_ACCESS_TOKEN or gh auth, gh auth status troubleshooting, MARKDOWN_MAGIC_GH_CLI=0 disable switch, CI recommendation to prefer tokens, and the fact that fetched private content can become generated markdown if committed.

Acceptance: docs include a practical REMOTE example for a GitHub blob URL and a private repo example using accessToken=process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN.
notes: Post-review correction: public REMOTE docs expose only githubToken, do not document accessToken as an alias, and do not support or recommend inline process.env.* token references in markdown blocks. Token lookup is limited to explicit githubToken values, standard process env checked internally, or authenticated gh CLI fallback.
close_reason: Updated README, transform JSDoc, advanced usage, and troubleshooting docs for GitHub blob/raw/private REMOTE behavior, tokens, gh auth, and MARKDOWN_MAGIC_GH_CLI=0.
